author: Niche Gamer
text:
Earth Defense Force 5 and Earth Defense Force 6 coming to Switch 2 D3 Publisher and developer Sandlot have announced both Earth Defense Force 5 and Earth Defense Force 6 are coming to Switch 2. While Earth Defense Force 5 is launching for Switch 2 on October 8th globally, Earth Defense Force 6 is launching for the hybrid console sometime this winter. Earth Defense Force 5 has been available for […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake announced Nintendo has announced a new The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake. The new The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake is in development for Switch 2, though a release date wasn’t announced. Here’s a reveal teaser trailer:

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Kingdom Hearts IV confirms release platforms with new trailer After four years Square Enix has finally confirmed release platforms for Kingdom Hearts IV. Kingdom Hearts IV is now launching for Windows PC (Steam, Microsoft Store, Epic Games Store), Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PS5. A release date for Kingdom Hearts IV was sadly not announced, but here’s a brief blurb and a new trailer: A […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Kingdom Hearts Collection [I~III] announced Square Enix has announced Kingdom Hearts Collection [I~III], a new collection of the original three Kingdom Hearts games. Kingdom Hearts Collection [I~III] is in development for Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PS5 with a release set for October 8th. Preorders are now live. Each game will be available separately and the games will be re-released for […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Metaphor: ReFantazio coming to Switch 2 Publisher Atlus and developer Studio Zero announced Metaphor: ReFantazio is coming to Switch 2. Their hit fantasy JRPG is coming to the hybrid console later this year, on November 12th. Metaphor: ReFantazio has been available since on October 2024 for Windows PC (Steam, Microsoft Store), Xbox Series X|S, PS4, and PS5. Get our review here! Here’s a rundown on […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Duskbloods closed network test coming this summer Publisher Nintendo and developer FromSoftware announcing a closed network test for The Duskbloods is coming sometime this summer. The new network test will give players a first chance at playing the new soulslike game, which is in development for Switch 2. Here’s a blurb on the game, plus a new trailer: In this new multiplayer action game, you’ll take […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Tales of Eternia Remastered announced Bandai Namco has announced Tales of Eternia Remastered, the previously leaked remastered version of their beloved RPG. Tales of Eternia Remastered is set to launch later this year for Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch, Switch 2, PS4, and PS5 on October 16th. Here’s a reveal trailer:

Final Fantasy Resonance announced Square Enix has announced Final Fantasy Resonance, an all-new HD-2D Final Fantasy game. Final Fantasy Resonance is set to launch later this year for Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch, Switch 2, and PS5 on October 22nd. Here’s a brief blurb on the game, plus its reveal trailer: Return to the pixel‑art world of […]

Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories will launch sometime in early 2027 for Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PS5. text:
Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World launches in December Publisher Square Enix and developer TOSE announced Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World, the latest in their Dragon Quest Monsters spinoff series. Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World is set to launch across Windows PC (Steam, Microsoft Store), Xbox Series X|S, Switch, Switch 2, and PS5 on December 3rd. author: Niche Gamer
text:
Xenoblade Genesis announced Publisher Nintendo and developer Monolith Soft have announced Xenoblade Genesis, an all-new entry in their beloved RPG series. Xenoblade Genesis is in development for Nintendo Switch 2 and will launch sometime in 2027.

text:
Muramasa Revenant Blades announced for PC and consoles Publisher Marvelous and dveloper Vanillaware announced Muramasa Revenant Blades, a new release for their beloved sidescrolling action-adventure game. Muramasa Revenant Blades is in development for PC (Steam), Switch, Switch 2, and PS5 with a release set for early 2027. This is the first Vanillaware game to be released for PC. Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition announced Capcom has announced Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition, a new port for Switch 2 coming this summer. Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition is launching for Switch 2 digitally first on June 23rd and later at retail on August 28th. Devil May Cry 5 has been available for Windows PC (via Steam), Xbox One, Xbox […]

text:
Nintendo launches new Donkey Kong challenges and Mario collaboration event Nintendo announced a limited-time event running from June 9 through September 1 that rewards Nintendo Switch Online members with collectible digital DK Challenge Cards. Players can earn these rewards by completing special objectives in Donkey Kong Bananza as well as select classic Donkey Kong games available through Nintendo Switch Online. The challenges range from completing […]

Orbitals launches in September Publisher Kepler Interactive and developer Shapefarm announced a release date for Orbitals, their new retro anime co-op adventure game. Orbitals is launching exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2 on September 3rd, worldwide.
